mapper.select:
/* PlatformProdNmRegMapper.getPlatformProdNmRegList */ SELECT thp.HQ_OFFICE_CD , (SELECT HQ_BRAND_NM FROM TB_HQ_BRAND thb WHERE thb.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND thb.HQ_BRAND_CD = thp.HQ_BRAND_CD) AS HQ_BRAND_NM , thp.PROD_CD , thp.PROD_NM , thp.PROD_CLASS_CD , (SELECT SF_GET_PROD_CLASSES('H', thp.HQ_OFFICE_CD, thp.PROD_CLASS_CD) FROM DUAL) AS PROD_CLASS_NM , CASE WHEN INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP, 1, INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP, CHR(10)) - 1) ELSE thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP END AS POS_PROD_NM_1 , CASE WHEN INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP, INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP, CHR(10)) + 1) ELSE NULL END AS POS_PROD_NM_2 , CASE WHEN INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK, 1, INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK, CHR(10)) - 1) ELSE thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK END AS KIOSK_PROD_NM_1 , CASE WHEN INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK, INSTR(thpi.PROD_KO_NM_DISP_KIOSK, CHR(10)) + 1) ELSE NULL END AS KIOSK_PROD_NM_2 , NVL(thpsp.SALE_UPRC, 0) AS SALE_UPRC , thp.USE_YN FROM TB_HQ_PRODUCT thp , TB_HQ_PRODUCT_INFO thpi , TB_HQ_PRODUCT_SALE_PRICE_V01 thpsp WHERE 1=1 AND thp.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND thp.HQ_OFFICE_CD = thpi.HQ_OFFICE_CD (+) AND thp.PROD_CD = thpi.PROD_CD (+) AND thp.HQ_OFFICE_CD = thpsp.HQ_OFFICE_CD AND thp.PROD_CD = thpsp.PROD_CD AND thpsp.SALE_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd')
AND thp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%' --상품코드
AND thp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%' --상품명
AND thp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN ( SELECT PROD_CLASS_CD FROM TB_HQ_PRODUCT_CLASS WHERE HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} START WITH PROD_CLASS_CD = #{prodClassCd} AND HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} CONNECT BY PRIOR PROD_CLASS_CD = P_PROD_CLASS_CD AND HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} )
AND thp.USE_YN = #{useYn} --사용여부
AND thp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND thp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND ( ( ((SELECT COUNT(HQ_BRAND_CD) FROM TB_WB_USER_BRAND WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) != 0) AND (thp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN (SELECT HQ_BRAND_CD FROM TB_WB_USER_BRAND WHERE USER_ID = #{userId})) ) OR ( ((SELECT COUNT(HQ_BRAND_CD) FROM TB_WB_USER_BRAND WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) = 0) AND 1=1 ) ) ORDER BY thp.PROD_CD ASC
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{posProdNm2}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) IS NULL THEN TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{posProdNm1}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) ELSE TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{posProdNm1}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) || CHR(10) || TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{posProdNm2}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) END

CASE WHEN TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{kioskProdNm2}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) IS NULL THEN TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{kioskProdNm1}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) ELSE TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{kioskProdNm1}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) || CHR(10) || TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{kioskProdNm2}, CHR(10), NULL), CHR(13), NULL), CHR(9), NULL)) END
